meta.title: AoD | Freely-Elected Taiwan Is Critical for Technological Arsenals
meta.description:
Hudson Senior Fellow Riley Walters joins Marshall Kosloff to recap the recent elections in Taiwan, which saw new coalitions forming inside the strategic island nation. Additionally, they discuss why Taiwan is, and will be, at the center of global technological supply chains for a long time thanks to its leadership in chip and superconductor development.

Arsenal of Democracy is a weekly podcast produced by Hudson Institute and hosted by Marshall Kosloff. Subscribe for the latest episodes and content.

Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/arsenal-of-democracy/id1701812241
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/2DvzfhSJPvZeXrEAFKG3jG
